name: fresh_high_performance_typical
note: CHL practical fresh high-performance pack band.

name: strong_fresh_target
note: CHL describes below 10 mOhm/cell as a strong fresh-pack target.

name: usable_healthy_band
note: CHL practical usable/healthy band.

name: tired_high_performance_pack
note: CHL practical threshold above which high-performance packs are considered tired.

name: oscar_1500mah_great
note: Oscar Liang 1500mAh mini-quad LiPo field threshold: below about 10 mOhm/cell is a great battery. Compare packs at similar temperature, state of charge, size, and age.

name: oscar_1500mah_fine
note: Oscar Liang 1500mAh mini-quad LiPo field threshold: 10-15 mOhm/cell is generally fine for normal use, but no longer a very low-IR pack.

name: oscar_1500mah_old
note: Oscar Liang 1500mAh mini-quad LiPo field threshold: 15-20 mOhm/cell is old/high-resistance for FPV use.

name: oscar_1500mah_retire
note: Oscar Liang 1500mAh mini-quad LiPo field threshold: above about 20 mOhm/cell is a retire/relegate signal for high-performance use.

name: DroneLab 4S 50C 1500mAh
